free_text: Comprehensive study of the 6,7Li + 124Sn reactions at
Target foils of 124Sn of thickness 70 ug/cm2,
evaporated onto about 5 ug/cm2 carbon backing foils.
SATURN array - was used to detect the charged
particles. Silicon surface barrier detectors mounted
Three surface barrier detectors at 45 and
80 deg, in steps of 5 degree for normalization.
Three telescopes were mounted on at 120, 130
and 140 degree on a fixed support.
